abilities.description: Prevent the next X damage that would be dealt this turn to any number of targets, divided as you choose, where X is the number of verse counters on CARDNAME.

effect.description: Prevent the next X damage that would be dealt this turn to any number of targets, divided as you choose, where X is the number of verse counters on CARDNAME.
effect.name: PreventDamage

abilities.target_prompt: Select any target to prevent damage to

triggers.description: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a verse counter on CARDNAME.
